matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: American History is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: American history at the University of Cambridge is a dynamic field which covers the history of what is now the United States, from the colonial period to the modern era. The MPhil in American History enables students to develop expertise in this ever-expanding field of historical scholarship.
